fault_hypothesis: The function uses logical OR (`or`) on line 67 to combine mask elements, but the specification requires an element-wise conjunction (logical AND).

constraints.intent: The newly appended element must be the logical AND of the corresponding input elements.

spec.expr: (not a or not b) implies not merged[-1]

constraints.intent: If either input element for the current position is False, the merged element must also be False.

spec.expr: all((x and y) == z for x, y, z in zip(mask_a, mask_b, merged__1))

constraints.intent: The final list must be the element-wise logical AND of the input masks before it is returned.
